title: Dave Gomboc
text: Home * People * Dave Gomboc David (Dave) Ross Gomboc , a Canadian computer scientist and AI researcher affiliated with AAAI , ACM , ICGA and IEEE [1] and the University of Southern California [2] . His research interests include automatic tuning of evaluation functions , which was also topic of his 2004 masters thesis at University of Alberta [3] . In 2000, Dave Gomboc serverd as moderator in CCC .
